title: epipactis greuteri
intro: Epipactis greuteri, also known as the Greek helleborine, is a species of orchid native to Greece. It is a terrestrial orchid with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Epipactis greuteri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal preparation methods.
